name: Disposable Plates
description: Sturdy disposable plates suitable for parties, events, and food businesses. Available in small and large sizes.

name: Takeaway Food Containers
description: Leak-proof containers for takeaway meals. Ideal for restaurants, canteens, and food vendors.

name: Plastic Cups
description: Clear disposable cups for water, juice, and soft drinks. Perfect for events and daily use.

name: Serving Trays
description: Large serving trays for buffets, weddings, and corporate events. Lightweight and durable.

name: Napkins & Serviettes
description: Soft 2-ply serviettes for table settings. Available in white and assorted colours.

name: Nylon Takeaway Bags
description: Printed nylon bags for takeaway orders. Keeps food secure and presents your brand well.
